description: Create the complete mega-navigation section with all 5 files: sections/mega-navigation.liquid, assets/mega-navigation.css, assets/mega-navigation.js, snippets/mega-nav-column.liquid, and snippets/mega-nav-promo.liquid. This is a premium Symmetry-like independent navigation section inspired by TheJacketMaker.com. It features per-item color customization (SALE = red), hover underline animations, multi-column mega dropdowns with promo images, mobile drawer with accordion sub-menus, and 35-50 mn_ prefixed settings.
steps: Step 1: Create snippets/mega-nav-column.liquid - A snippet that receives primitive parameters (column_title, linklist_handle, heading_color, text_color, badge_new_color, badge_sale_color, badge_hot_color) via {% render %} with: syntax. It looks up linklists[linklist_handle] internally. It renders a column heading and list of links. If a link title contains [NEW], [SALE], or [HOT], it strips the tag text and renders a colored badge span next to the link text.

Step 2: Create snippets/mega-nav-promo.liquid - A snippet that receives primitive parameters (image_url, image_alt, heading, subheading, button_text, button_url, overlay_color, text_color) via {% render %} with: syntax. It renders a featured promo card with image, optional heading/subheading overlay, and CTA button.

Step 3: Create assets/mega-navigation.css - Full stylesheet scoped to .mega-navigation-section. Includes: (a) Nav bar styles - full-width, flexbox centered items, configurable via CSS custom properties (--mn-*); (b) Menu item styles - uppercase, letter-spacing, per-item color via inline style or CSS var; (c) Hover underline animation - center-expand pseudo-element, color inherits from per-item CSS var or global default; (d) Mega dropdown panel - full-width, multi-column grid, fade/slide animation controlled by CSS class + custom property duration; (e) Column styles - heading bold, links list; (f) Promo card styles; (g) Badge styles ([NEW]=green, [SALE]=red, [HOT]=orange); (h) Sticky nav behavior; (i) Mobile drawer - full-screen or slide-from-side, accordion sub-menus; (j) Responsive breakpoints (990px desktop threshold matching Dawn). All colors/sizes via --mn-* CSS custom properties.

Step 4: Create assets/mega-navigation.js - Vanilla JS IIFE. Handles: (a) Desktop hover-to-open mega dropdowns with configurable delay; (b) Close dropdown when mouse leaves both trigger and panel; (c) Mobile hamburger toggle for drawer; (d) Mobile accordion expand/collapse for sub-menus; (e) Sticky nav - adds class on scroll past threshold; (f) Keyboard accessibility - Escape closes dropdown, arrow keys navigate; (g) Shopify editor events (shopify:section:load, shopify:section:unload, shopify:block:select, shopify:block:deselect) for live preview in Customizer; (h) Close all dropdowns when clicking outside.

Step 5: Create sections/mega-navigation.liquid - The main section file. Structure: (a) Conditional asset loading (mega-navigation.css + mega-navigation.js); (b) Inline <style> block outputting --mn-* CSS custom properties from section settings; (c) Navigation bar markup with menu items from main linklist (mn_main_menu setting); (d) For each block of type 'menu_item': output the nav link with optional per-item color (gated by checkbox mn_use_custom_color on the block), optional badge, hover underline; (e) For each block: output the mega dropdown panel with columns rendered via {% render 'mega-nav-column' %} passing primitives, and optional promo via {% render 'mega-nav-promo' %} passing primitives; (f) Mobile drawer markup with hamburger button, overlay, close button, accordion menus; (g) {% schema %} with 35-50 mn_ prefixed settings in section-level settings and block-level settings for per-menu-item customization.

Step 6: Schema design - Section-level settings (mn_ prefix, plain English labels): mn_enable (checkbox, master toggle), mn_main_menu (link_list picker), mn_bg_color (color), mn_text_color (color), mn_font_size (range 12-22 step 1 default 14), mn_font_weight (select: 400/500/600/700), mn_letter_spacing (range 0-5 step 1 default 1), mn_text_transform (select: none/uppercase/capitalize), mn_hover_color (color - global default hover/underline color), mn_hover_underline_thickness (range 1-5 step 1 default 2), mn_hover_animation (select: center-expand/left-to-right/fade), mn_sticky (checkbox), mn_sticky_bg (color), mn_border_bottom (checkbox), mn_border_color (color), mn_dropdown_bg (color), mn_dropdown_text_color (color), mn_dropdown_heading_color (color), mn_dropdown_animation (select: fade/slide-down/slide-up/zoom), mn_dropdown_duration (range 100-600 step 50 default 250), mn_dropdown_shadow (checkbox), mn_dropdown_border (checkbox), mn_badge_new_color (color), mn_badge_sale_color (color), mn_badge_hot_color (color), mn_mobile_breakpoint (hidden, always 990), mn_mobile_drawer_position (select: left/right/fullscreen), mn_mobile_font_size (range 14-24 step 1 default 16), mn_mobile_padding (range 8-24 step 2 default 12), mn_mobile_accordion_icon (select: plus/chevron/arrow), mn_section_padding_top (range 0-40 step 4 default 0), mn_section_padding_bottom (range 0-40 step 4 default 0). Block type 'menu_item' settings: menu_link (text - the menu item title/handle), menu_url (url), mn_use_custom_color (checkbox gate), mn_item_color (color - e.g., red for SALE), mn_item_hover_color (color - e.g., red hover for SALE), mn_item_badge (select: none/new/sale/hot), mn_columns (range 2-6 step 1 default 4), mn_col1_title through mn_col6_title (text), mn_col1_linklist through mn_col6_linklist (link_list), mn_show_promo (checkbox), mn_promo_image (image_picker), mn_promo_heading (text), mn_promo_subheading (text), mn_promo_button_text (text), mn_promo_button_url (url).

Step 7: Validate all Shopify rules - Ensure: (a) All range settings pass (max-min)/step <= 100 and (default-min) % step == 0; (b) All ranges have integer steps; (c) No trailing commas in JSON schema; (d) No t: translation keys on new settings; (e) No emojis in schema headers; (f) No tag or class in schema root object; (g) No null in Liquid (use nil); (h) No width=auto; (i) All {% if/for/case/comment/capture/form/style/schema %} tags are balanced; (j) {% render %} calls pass only primitive values (strings, numbers, booleans); (k) Snippets use linklists[handle] not linklist objects; (l) Color override settings gated by checkbox (mn_use_custom_color on block); (m) SVGs have xmlns attribute.
Step 8: Run the validation script to confirm all checks pass.
acceptance_criteria: 5 files exist: sections/mega-navigation.liquid, assets/mega-navigation.css, assets/mega-navigation.js, snippets/mega-nav-column.liquid, snippets/mega-nav-promo.liquid
Schema JSON in mega-navigation.liquid parses cleanly with no errors
All mn_ settings are in range 35-50 count
All range settings pass (max-min)/step <= 100 and (default-min) % step == 0 with integer steps
Every mn_ setting ID is referenced at least once in the liquid body, CSS, or JS
No bareword null in any .liquid file
Liquid block balance: all open tags have matching close tags
{% render %} calls pass only primitives (no linklist or collection objects)
Per-item color customization (SALE = red) works via checkbox-gated color picker on block settings
Hover underline inherits per-item color when custom color is enabled
Mobile drawer with accordion sub-menus is included
Shopify editor events handled in JS for Customizer preview
CSS scoped to .mega-navigation-section - no style leakage to other sections
